column1: TRACEABILITY MATRIX — ELDER FALL DETECTION SYSTEM
Document ID: DHF-TRM-001 | Revision: B | Status: APPROVED | Effective Date: 2026-03-22
Approved By: safety_engineer (J. Hartmann) | regulatory_specialist (M. Osei)

column4: Design Input Requirement (SRS)

column2: Detect falls in elderly users in real time
column4: Device shall detect fall event within 2 s; sensitivity >= 95%
column6: Fall detection algorithm FD-CORE-001 (firmware module + cloud classifier)
column8: Unit test: sensitivity on labeled fall dataset n=500 MEMS events
column12: Hardware-in-loop: 50 scripted fall trajectories on MEMS bench fixture
column16: End-to-end fall signal: sensor->firmware->cloud classifier->result return
column20: Simulated-use: 10 users 5 falls each in representative home environment

column2: Minimize false alarms to reduce alert fatigue
column4: False positive rate <= 5 per user per day during ADL
column6: Activity classifier ACTV-CLS-001 tuned for ADL specificity
column8: Unit test: specificity on ADL dataset n=1000 events
column12: HIL: 200 ADL motion sequences — verify no spurious trigger
column16: Integration: 48-h continuous ADL simulation — count false triggers
column20: 7-day wear study: false alarm count in home environment n=20 users

column2: Alert caregivers within 60 s of fall detection
column4: Alert notification delivered to caregiver app <= 60 s from detection event
column8: End-to-end latency: 100 simulated events — all < 60 s; 99th percentile measured
column12: HIL: 25 triggered alerts over cellular and Wi-Fi paths
column16: Integration: 100 scripted fall events — alert receipt time logged
column20: Usability: 15 caregivers receive and act on alerts; acceptance time criterion met

column4: Battery life >= 7 days at 25 C normal operation
column8: Bench: 3 units continuous discharge — record hours to cutoff
column12: HIL: power-mode state machine transitions under scripted duty cycle
column16: Integration: 10-day firmware runtime with telemetry logging
column20: Field simulation: 10-day continuous wear n=5 units

column4: Weight <= 30 g; >= 90% donning/doffing success without assistance
column6: Mechanical wrist-worn enclosure and strap assembly
column8: Weight measurement (pass <= 30 g); dimensional inspection per drawing MEC-001
column12: N/A — mechanical requirement; bench dimensional verification only
column16: N/A — form factor; validated via human factors
column20: Human factors: 15 elderly users (65+) donning/doffing; >= 90% success

column2: Protect user health data per privacy regulations
column4: TLS 1.3 in transit; AES-256 at rest; HIPAA Security Rule compliance
column6: Security architecture: TLS 1.3 stack + AES-256 encrypted database
column8: Code review (security) + penetration test + encryption verification test
column12: HIL: TLS handshake verification and cipher suite validation on device
column16: Integration: HIPAA compliance audit by independent reviewer; SQL injection / XSS tests
column20: Security validation: HIPAA compliance audit — zero critical findings

column2: Safe for elderly users with common comorbidities
column4: IEC 60601-1 general safety; no single fault causes patient harm
column6: Hardware safety: electrical isolation + ISO 10993 biocompatible materials
column8: IEC 60601-1 dielectric strength + leakage current; ISO 10993 biocompat testing
column12: HIL: single-fault injection — verify safe-state entry and watchdog reset
column16: Integration: FMEA failure mode injection; no patient harm scenario identified
column20: Simulated use safety: no safety incidents across all validation scenarios

column4: GPS <= 10 m accuracy outdoors; last-known location indoors via BLE/WiFi
column6: GPS module + BLE/WiFi fallback in firmware and cloud
column8: GPS: 50 outdoor locations >= 95% within 10 m; indoor BLE fallback test
column12: HIL: GPS NMEA injection — verify parsing and threshold alerts
column16: Integration: 20 outdoor/indoor position requests — accuracy logged
column20: Simulated emergency drill: caregiver locates device using app n=10 scenarios

column2: Caregiver device and user status information
column4: Battery level +/-5%; wear status; fall history; updated <= 15 min
column6: Caregiver mobile app dashboard + REST polling and WebSocket push
column8: App functional: battery accuracy; status latency; fall history completeness
column12: HIL: simulated battery drain curve vs reported level
column16: Integration: 24-h continuous status polling — latency and accuracy logged
column20: Usability: caregivers rate information utility; SUS score >= 70

column2: Withstand environmental conditions for elderly users
column4: IP67 (1 m 30 min); operating temp 0-45 C
column6: Environmental sealing: enclosure gaskets and material selection
column8: IP67 per IEC 60529 (3 units); temp cycling per IEC 60068-2
column12: HIL: firmware behavior at temperature extremes (0 C and 45 C) on bench
column16: Integration: firmware log integrity after thermal soak cycle
column20: Environmental stress: shower simulation n=3 units; temp soak

column2: Safe state entry on sensor fault within 500 ms
column4: System shall detect sensor fault and enter safe state within 500 ms
column6: Safety state machine in firmware FSM-SAFE-001
column8: Unit test: fault injection -> safe state transition time measured n=100 trials
column12: HIL: hardware sensor pull-out during operation — safe state entry verified
column16: Integration: cloud receives SAFE_STATE event within 600 ms of sensor fault
column20: Simulated use: evaluator deliberately removes sensor; safe state and alert generated

column2: No operation outside validated parameter range
column4: System shall reject out-of-range inputs and not produce unsafe output
column6: Input validation module VALID-001 in firmware and cloud
column8: Unit test: boundary condition inputs; verify rejection and no unsafe state
column12: HIL: out-of-range MEMS values injected — firmware rejects and logs
column16: Integration: cloud API fuzz testing — no unsafe action on malformed input
column20: N/A — verified at unit and integration level; no additional validation required

column2: Safety-critical state transitions logged to tamper-evident audit
column4: All safety-critical transitions logged with timestamp and sequence number
column6: Audit log module AUDIT-001: append-only with HMAC chain
column8: Unit test: 1000 log writes; verify HMAC chain integrity; tamper attempt detection
column12: HIL: firmware audit writes verified via JTAG readback
column16: Integration: end-to-end audit trail: firmware event -> cloud log -> dashboard display
column20: Compliance audit: log completeness and integrity review by regulatory_specialist

column4: Each SOUP item shall have documented version lock and risk assessment
column6: SOUP inventory and version lock in requirements file
column8: SOUP inventory review: 12 SOUP items all have version lock and risk assessment
column16: Integration: SOUP functional verification in integrated context per IEC 62304 §7

column4: All post-release changes follow documented change control SOP
column6: Change control SOP CC-EFD-001 and Git-enforced branch protection
column8: Procedure review: CC-EFD-001 reviewed and approved

column2: Electronic signatures on approval records per 21 CFR Part 11
column4: All approval records carry electronic signature with name and date
column6: E-signature integration in SAGE approval workflow
column8: Review: all DHF approval records verified to have electronic signature fields populated

column4: Description
Initial draft — 10 user needs
Final: SR and RR rows added; HIL column added; 100% coverage confirmed; approved
